evals.prompt: We're launching a new AI feature in 6 weeks and want to make a big splash. We have a 5,000-person email list and active communities on LinkedIn and Twitter.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a week-by-week timeline for the 6-week lead-up. Should create a channel plan for email, LinkedIn, and Twitter. Should include a launch-day coordination plan. Should provide an asset checklist. Should recommend a post-launch follow-through plan. Should define success metrics.
assertions: Creates channel plan for each platform
